profile.name: Daenerys Targaryen
profile.currentTitle: Queen of the Andals, the Rhoynar, and the First Men
profile.summary: From stateless refugee to sovereign of the largest military force in the known world. Built an empire from zero assets through liberation movements, strategic conquests, and an unshakable vision of a better world. Commanded three dragons, an army of formerly enslaved soldiers, and a Dothraki horde — scaling from nothing to continental power in under eight years. The ultimate founder story.

evidence.outcome: Articulated a compelling vision of liberation that recruited armies, advisors, and entire cities to her cause
evidence.description: Articulated a compelling vision of liberation that recruited armies, advisors, and entire cities to her cause

evidence.outcome: Maintained strategic direction across an 8-year campaign spanning two continents and dozens of military engagements
evidence.description: Maintained strategic direction across an 8-year campaign spanning two continents and dozens of military engagements

evidence.outcome: Inspired loyalty from culturally diverse followers — Dothraki, Unsullied, Essosi freedmen, and Westerosi lords — through shared purpose
evidence.description: Inspired loyalty from culturally diverse followers — Dothraki, Unsullied, Essosi freedmen, and Westerosi lords — through shared purpose

evidence.outcome: Grew from a single khalasar to commanding the largest combined military force in known history
evidence.description: Grew from a single khalasar to commanding the largest combined military force in known history

evidence.outcome: Scaled governance from a single city (Meereen) to preparation for continental rule
evidence.description: Scaled governance from a single city (Meereen) to preparation for continental rule

evidence.outcome: Built organizational infrastructure — advisors, commanders, supply chains — to support exponential growth
evidence.description: Built organizational infrastructure — advisors, commanders, supply chains — to support exponential growth

evidence.outcome: Conquered three slave cities (Astapor, Yunkai, Meereen) through distinct tactical approaches — deception, siege, and infiltration
evidence.description: Conquered three slave cities (Astapor, Yunkai, Meereen) through distinct tactical approaches — deception, siege, and infiltration

evidence.outcome: Unified Dothraki khalasars under single command — the first leader to do so since Khal Menin
evidence.description: Unified Dothraki khalasars under single command — the first leader to do so since Khal Menin

evidence.outcome: Executed combined-arms warfare integrating dragon air power, cavalry, and infantry at the Battle of the Goldroad
evidence.description: Executed combined-arms warfare integrating dragon air power, cavalry, and infantry at the Battle of the Goldroad

evidence.outcome: Deployed three dragons as strategic weapons — fundamentally changing the military calculus of every engagement
evidence.description: Deployed three dragons as strategic weapons — fundamentally changing the military calculus of every engagement

evidence.outcome: Used dragon demonstrations as diplomatic leverage — the threat of force as substitute for its use
evidence.description: Used dragon demonstrations as diplomatic leverage — the threat of force as substitute for its use

evidence.outcome: Projected military power across the Narrow Sea through naval logistics and alliance with Yara Greyjoy's Iron Fleet
evidence.description: Projected military power across the Narrow Sea through naval logistics and alliance with Yara Greyjoy's Iron Fleet

evidence.outcome: Freed the Unsullied of Astapor through a tactical deception that simultaneously acquired an army and destroyed a slave market
evidence.description: Freed the Unsullied of Astapor through a tactical deception that simultaneously acquired an army and destroyed a slave market

evidence.outcome: Liberated Meereen through alliance with enslaved populations who opened the city from within
evidence.description: Liberated Meereen through alliance with enslaved populations who opened the city from within

evidence.outcome: Built a political movement around abolition that attracted followers from across Essos
evidence.description: Built a political movement around abolition that attracted followers from across Essos

evidence.outcome: Abolished slavery across Slaver's Bay — restructuring an entire regional economy
evidence.description: Abolished slavery across Slaver's Bay — restructuring an entire regional economy

evidence.outcome: Attempted to build new social institutions in Meereen including courts, labor systems, and civil governance
evidence.description: Attempted to build new social institutions in Meereen including courts, labor systems, and civil governance

evidence.outcome: Navigated the backlash of economic disruption from abolition including insurgency, economic collapse, and foreign intervention
evidence.description: Navigated the backlash of economic disruption from abolition including insurgency, economic collapse, and foreign intervention

evidence.outcome: United the Unsullied, Dothraki, Dornish, Greyjoy, and Tyrell forces under a single command structure
evidence.description: United the Unsullied, Dothraki, Dornish, Greyjoy, and Tyrell forces under a single command structure

evidence.outcome: Secured alliance with Jon Snow and the North through negotiation, mutual respect, and shared threat assessment
evidence.description: Secured alliance with Jon Snow and the North through negotiation, mutual respect, and shared threat assessment

evidence.outcome: Built advisor corps spanning multiple cultures — Tyrion (Westerosi), Missandei (Naathi), Grey Worm (Astapori), Jorah (Northern)
evidence.description: Built advisor corps spanning multiple cultures — Tyrion (Westerosi), Missandei (Naathi), Grey Worm (Astapori), Jorah (Northern)

evidence.outcome: Negotiated with the Masters of Yunkai, the leaders of Qarth, and Westerosi lords across multiple diplomatic contexts
evidence.description: Negotiated with the Masters of Yunkai, the leaders of Qarth, and Westerosi lords across multiple diplomatic contexts

evidence.outcome: Used titles and ceremony as diplomatic tools — projecting legitimate authority before it was fully established
evidence.description: Used titles and ceremony as diplomatic tools — projecting legitimate authority before it was fully established

evidence.outcome: Communicated in Dothraki, High Valyrian, and Common Tongue — adapting language and register to audience
evidence.description: Communicated in Dothraki, High Valyrian, and Common Tongue — adapting language and register to audience

evidence.outcome: Survived the destruction of her khalasar, assassination attempts, and military defeats without losing strategic coherence
evidence.description: Survived the destruction of her khalasar, assassination attempts, and military defeats without losing strategic coherence

evidence.outcome: Led the defense of Winterfell against the Army of the Dead — committing her forces to an existential fight not her own
evidence.description: Led the defense of Winterfell against the Army of the Dead — committing her forces to an existential fight not her own

evidence.outcome: Made real-time tactical decisions during the Battle of King's Landing including deployment of Drogon against fortified defenses
evidence.description: Made real-time tactical decisions during the Battle of King's Landing including deployment of Drogon against fortified defenses

evidence.outcome: Recognized Jorah Mormont's value despite his betrayal — ultimately accepting him back after he proved his loyalty
evidence.description: Recognized Jorah Mormont's value despite his betrayal — ultimately accepting him back after he proved his loyalty

evidence.outcome: Appointed Tyrion Lannister as Hand despite his family being her sworn enemies — correctly assessing his strategic value
evidence.description: Appointed Tyrion Lannister as Hand despite his family being her sworn enemies — correctly assessing his strategic value

evidence.outcome: Identified Missandei's diplomatic and linguistic capabilities and elevated her from translator to chief advisor
evidence.description: Identified Missandei's diplomatic and linguistic capabilities and elevated her from translator to chief advisor

evidence.outcome: Built 'Breaker of Chains' brand that preceded her — cities opened their gates based on reputation alone
evidence.description: Built 'Breaker of Chains' brand that preceded her — cities opened their gates based on reputation alone

evidence.outcome: Used dragon imagery, ceremony, and spectacle to project power beyond her actual military reach
evidence.description: Used dragon imagery, ceremony, and spectacle to project power beyond her actual military reach

evidence.outcome: Created a personal brand so compelling that people crossed continents to serve her cause
evidence.description: Created a personal brand so compelling that people crossed continents to serve her cause

evidence.outcome: Fought the Sons of the Harpy insurgency in Meereen through combined military and political approaches
evidence.description: Fought the Sons of the Harpy insurgency in Meereen through combined military and political approaches

evidence.outcome: Learned that military conquest without institutional governance creates power vacuums that breed resistance
evidence.description: Learned that military conquest without institutional governance creates power vacuums that breed resistance

evidence.outcome: Adapted counterinsurgency strategy from pure force to political compromise — opening fighting pits as concession
evidence.description: Adapted counterinsurgency strategy from pure force to political compromise — opening fighting pits as concession

evidence.outcome: Acquired the Unsullied army through tactical deception costing zero gold
evidence.description: Acquired the Unsullied army through tactical deception costing zero gold

evidence.outcome: United all Dothraki khalasars by demonstrating power through fire — converting rivals into followers
evidence.description: United all Dothraki khalasars by demonstrating power through fire — converting rivals into followers

evidence.outcome: Secured ships, supplies, and allies through a combination of negotiation, demonstration, and strategic marriage
evidence.description: Secured ships, supplies, and allies through a combination of negotiation, demonstration, and strategic marriage

evidence.outcome: Delivered speeches in multiple languages that moved crowds of thousands to immediate action
evidence.description: Delivered speeches in multiple languages that moved crowds of thousands to immediate action

evidence.outcome: Used rhetoric of liberation and justice to build loyalty more durable than any political arrangement
evidence.description: Used rhetoric of liberation and justice to build loyalty more durable than any political arrangement

evidence.outcome: Spoke to the Dothraki in their language about their destiny — earning respect that previous leaders demanded through combat
evidence.description: Spoke to the Dothraki in their language about their destiny — earning respect that previous leaders demanded through combat

evidence.outcome: Attempted to design new economic and social systems for post-slavery Meereen
evidence.description: Attempted to design new economic and social systems for post-slavery Meereen

evidence.outcome: Established courts, appointed administrators, and created civil infrastructure in conquered cities
evidence.description: Established courts, appointed administrators, and created civil infrastructure in conquered cities

evidence.outcome: Struggled with the gap between revolutionary vision and institutional governance — a common founder challenge
evidence.description: Struggled with the gap between revolutionary vision and institutional governance — a common founder challenge

evidence.outcome: Coordinated naval transport of 100,000+ troops across the Narrow Sea
evidence.description: Coordinated naval transport of 100,000+ troops across the Narrow Sea

evidence.outcome: Secured Greyjoy fleet alliance providing naval superiority for the Westeros campaign
evidence.description: Secured Greyjoy fleet alliance providing naval superiority for the Westeros campaign

evidence.outcome: Understood the strategic importance of Dragonstone as naval staging point for continental invasion
evidence.description: Understood the strategic importance of Dragonstone as naval staging point for continental invasion

evidence.outcome: Led organizations spanning Dothraki, Unsullied, Westerosi, Naathi, and other cultures simultaneously
evidence.description: Led organizations spanning Dothraki, Unsullied, Westerosi, Naathi, and other cultures simultaneously

evidence.outcome: Adapted leadership style from Dothraki warrior-queen to Meereenese ruler to Westerosi sovereign
evidence.description: Adapted leadership style from Dothraki warrior-queen to Meereenese ruler to Westerosi sovereign

evidence.outcome: Built trust across cultural boundaries through shared mission rather than shared heritage
evidence.description: Built trust across cultural boundaries through shared mission rather than shared heritage

evidence.outcome: Managed logistics for continental-scale military campaigns including food, arms, and transport
evidence.description: Managed logistics for continental-scale military campaigns including food, arms, and transport

evidence.outcome: Organized the feeding and supply of a combined army of Dothraki and Unsullied during the march North
evidence.description: Organized the feeding and supply of a combined army of Dothraki and Unsullied during the march North

evidence.outcome: Dealt with supply disruption when Euron Greyjoy destroyed her fleet — adapting logistics in real-time
evidence.description: Dealt with supply disruption when Euron Greyjoy destroyed her fleet — adapting logistics in real-time

evidence.outcome: Survived assassination by the warlocks of Qarth, the Sons of the Harpy, and multiple military defeats
evidence.description: Survived assassination by the warlocks of Qarth, the Sons of the Harpy, and multiple military defeats

evidence.outcome: Rebuilt her power base from near-zero after being separated from her army and stranded in the Dothraki Sea
evidence.description: Rebuilt her power base from near-zero after being separated from her army and stranded in the Dothraki Sea

evidence.outcome: Lost her husband, two of her dragons, her closest advisor, and her claim to the throne — continuing forward each time
evidence.description: Lost her husband, two of her dragons, her closest advisor, and her claim to the throne — continuing forward each time

evidence.outcome: Struggled to define succession plan given her belief in her own inability to bear heirs
evidence.description: Struggled to define succession plan given her belief in her own inability to bear heirs

evidence.outcome: Failed to build institutional structures that could outlast her personal rule
evidence.description: Failed to build institutional structures that could outlast her personal rule

evidence.outcome: Acknowledged the limitation — 'break the wheel' vision was about systems, not dynasties — but implementation lagged
evidence.description: Acknowledged the limitation — 'break the wheel' vision was about systems, not dynasties — but implementation lagged

purpose: To break the wheel of power that crushes the people beneath it — building a world where no one is property and everyone has a voice.

workHistory.title: Queen of the Seven Kingdoms
workHistory.description: Led invasion of Westeros. United forces against the Night King at the Battle of Winterfell. Conquered King's Landing.

workHistory.title: Queen of Meereen
workHistory.description: Governed Meereen after liberation. Abolished slavery, fought Sons of the Harpy insurgency, established civil institutions. Built combined military force for Westeros campaign.

workHistory.title: Liberator & Conqueror
workHistory.description: Conquered Astapor, Yunkai, and Meereen. Freed hundreds of thousands of enslaved people. Acquired the Unsullied army and built a liberation movement that reshaped the region.

workHistory.title: Khaleesi
workHistory.description: Rose from political marriage to leadership of a 40,000-strong Dothraki khalasar. Hatched three dragons — the first in over 150 years. Began building the coalition that would conquer a continent.

workHistory.title: Exile
workHistory.description: Stateless refugee, sheltered by allies in the Free Cities. Survived assassination attempts, political manipulation, and the psychological abuse of her brother Viserys.

education.field: Military Strategy, Governance, Languages, Dragon Husbandry
